content: Please begin / continue a conversation topic (greetings are not needed). Ensure to change the topic if the current one is losing steam. The conversation should steer towards topics which reveal information about the characters and who they are, or instead drive forward previous conversations in their memory.

Lydia: Damn elves and Imperials stink up this hold worse than a skeever’s wet cunt. Falkreath used to be pure Nord land before they crawled in like rot. Falkreath Guard: Aye, well, Jarl Siddgeir’s got… arrangements with the Empire. Keeps the gold flowing for our mead and patrols. Not my place to question it. Lydia: Pah! Gold over glory? Typical milk-drinker talk. MJR and I gutted a whole Thalmor patrol yesterday—left their prissy golden arses strewn across the road like festival decorations. Falkreath Guard: Saw that mess near the border. Real shame… might’ve been one of ‘em had a sister in the Solitude pleasure houses. Tight little thing, if you like pointy-eared— Lydia: Shut your hole before I rearrange your teeth! Only cunt MJR’s diving into tonight is mine, and maybe Serana’s if she begs pretty enough after we carve up these bandit whores. Falkreath Guard: Easy, shield-sister! Just saying… a man of his appetites might want variety. Even old Hroggar at the Dead Man’s Drink’s got three wives— Lydia: Say another godsdamned word and I’ll feed you your own balls. MJR’s cock belongs to
